paper_title: AFT Thermochronology and Thermal History Modeling

methods.description: Process for preparing and dating apatite fission-track (AFT) samples to determine the thermal history of rock samples.

steps.description: A total of 10 AFT samples were collected from Paleogene strata of the Lulehe Fm. and Xiaganchaigou Fm. in the lower part of the HLG section.
steps.searchable_summary: collect AFT samples from specified geological formations

steps.description: The sandstone samples were crushed, washed, and sieved. Apatite grains were extracted using conventional magnetic and heavy-liquid separation techniques.
steps.searchable_summary: process sandstone samples to extract apatite grains

steps.description: Apatite aliquots were mounted in epoxy, ground, polished, and etched for 20 s in a 5 N HNO3 solution at 20°C.
steps.searchable_summary: prepare apatite aliquots for track revelation

steps.description: Samples, age standards, and dosimeter glasses were packed with external detectors and irradiated at the Thermal Irradiation Center at Oregon State University.
Fission-track counting was performed using a fully manual method on an Autoscan fission-track counting system.
steps.searchable_summary: count fission tracks using Autoscan system

steps.description: The χ2 test was performed on single grain ages of each sample to quantify AFT age homogeneity.
steps.searchable_summary: perform χ2 test on single grain ages

steps.description: The observed age distributions of each sample were decomposed into grain age components using RadialPlotter and DensityPlotter programs.
steps.searchable_summary: decompose age distributions using RadialPlotter and DensityPlotter

methods.description: Modeling the post-depositional thermal history of samples using AFT age and length data to understand the thermal evolution of detrital rocks.

steps.description: We used the HeFTy program to model the thermal history.
steps.searchable_summary: use HeFTy program for thermal history modeling

steps.description: Defined prior constraints for the thermal modeling, including depositional age with ±5 Ma error and temperature ranges.
steps.searchable_summary: set prior constraints for thermal modeling

steps.description: The inversion results show thermal histories with two stages during post-deposition with a thermal transition in age ranges from 10-3 Ma.
steps.searchable_summary: validate thermal history results with inversion
